I can see from the past sessions that this exact task has been run before (session `2026-04-28_02-27-14`) and produced strong results. However, I'll plan a fresh full pipeline run to get an up-to-date, clean session with potentially improved results.

This is a complete ML task — text classification on product reviews — so all agents are needed:

1. **`data_collector`** — Fetch a public Amazon/product review dataset
2. **`data_preprocessor`** — Clean text, engineer NLP features (review length, word count, etc.)
3. **`data_validator`** — Verify data quality, class balance, no nulls
4. **`data_analyzer`** — EDA on sentiment distribution, top words, review patterns
5. **`trainer`** — Train binary text classifier (TF-IDF + ML models)
6. **`model_reviser`** — Evaluate with accuracy, F1, precision, recall, ROC-AUC
7. **`summarizer`** — Write session report

The previous session achieved **Accuracy 0.923, F1 0.950, AUC 0.967** on held-out data — a strong baseline to match or beat.

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.read_csv('/Users/ialyalin/Desktop/gp3/gp3/data/sessions/2026-04-28_02-42-36/processed/clean.csv')

# ── Target column ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
target_col = 'Positive'
feature_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c != target_col]
print("=== TARGET DISTRIBUTION ===")
print(df[target_col].value_counts())

# ── Categorical columns ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['object', 'category']).columns.tolist()
print("\n=== CATEGORICAL COLUMNS ===", cat_cols)

# ── Text columns (heuristic: object dtype with avg length > 40 chars) ──────────
text_cols = [c for c in cat_cols if df[c].dropna().str.len().mean() > 40]
print("=== TEXT COLUMNS ===", text_cols)

# ── Numeric columns ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
num_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=[np.number]).columns.tolist()
print("\n=== NUMERIC COLUMNS ===", num_cols)

# ── Feature count (excluding target) ──────────────────────────────────────────
print(f"\nTotal features (excl. target): {len(feature_cols)}")

# ── Outlier detection (IQR method on numeric cols excl. target) ───────────────
print("\n=== OUTLIER COUNTS (IQR ×1.5) ===")
outlier_summary = {}
for col in [c for c in num_cols if c != target_col]:
    Q1 = df[col].quantile(0.25)
    Q3 = df[col].quantile(0.75)
    IQR = Q3 - Q1
    outliers = ((df[col] < Q1 - 1.5 * IQR) | (df[col] > Q3 + 1.5 * IQR)).sum()
    pct = round(outliers / len(df) * 100, 2)
    outlier_summary[col] = {"count": int(outliers), "pct": pct}
    print(f"  {col}: {outliers} ({pct}%)")

# ── Numeric stats ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n=== NUMERIC STATS ===")
print(df[num_cols].describe())

# ── Empty / whitespace-only strings in text cols ──────────────────────────────
print("\n=== EMPTY STRINGS IN TEXT COLS ===")
for col in text_cols:
    empty = (df[col].str.strip() == '').sum()
    print(f"  {col}: {empty} empty")

# ── clean_reviewText sample ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n=== SAMPLE clean_reviewText ===")
print(df['clean_reviewText'].iloc[:3].tolist())
"}

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split, RandomizedSearchCV, StratifiedKFold, cross_val_score
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier, GradientBoostingClassifier
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
from sklearn.metrics import (accuracy_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score,
                              precision_score, recall_score, classification_report)
from scipy.sparse import hstack, csr_matrix
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# Load data
df = pd.read_csv('/Users/ialyalin/Desktop/gp3/gp3/data/sessions/2026-04-28_02-42-36/processed/clean.csv')

X_text = df['clean_reviewText']
X_meta = df[['review_length', 'word_count', 'exclamation_count']].values
y = df['Positive'].values

# Train/test split (stratified)
X_text_train, X_text_test, X_meta_train, X_meta_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X_text, X_meta, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42, stratify=y
)

print(f"Train size: {len(y_train)}, Test size: {len(y_test)}")
print(f"Train class dist: {np.bincount(y_train)}")
print(f"Test class dist:  {np.bincount(y_test)}")

# Build TF-IDF features
tfidf = TfidfVectorizer(max_features=15000, ngram_range=(1,2), sublinear_tf=True, min_df=3)
X_tfidf_train = tfidf.fit_transform(X_text_train)
X_tfidf_test  = tfidf.transform(X_text_test)

# Scale meta features and concatenate
scaler = StandardScaler()
X_meta_train_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X_meta_train)
X_meta_test_scaled  = scaler.transform(X_meta_test)

# Combine TF-IDF + meta features
X_train_combined = hstack([X_tfidf_train, csr_matrix(X_meta_train_scaled)])
X_test_combined  = hstack([X_tfidf_test,  csr_matrix(X_meta_test_scaled)])

print(f"\nCombined feature matrix shape (train): {X_train_combined.shape}")
print("Feature engineering complete.")
"}

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split, GridSearchCV, StratifiedKFold, cross_val_score
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.naive_bayes import MultinomialNB
from sklearn.metrics import (accuracy_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score,
                              precision_score, recall_score, classification_report)
from scipy.sparse import hstack, csr_matrix
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# ── Reload & split ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df = pd.read_csv('/Users/ialyalin/Desktop/gp3/gp3/data/sessions/2026-04-28_02-42-36/processed/clean.csv')
X_text = df['clean_reviewText']
X_meta = df[['review_length', 'word_count', 'exclamation_count']].values
y = df['Positive'].values

X_text_train, X_text_test, X_meta_train, X_meta_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X_text, X_meta, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42, stratify=y)

# ── Best TF-IDF config (from tuning) ────────────────────────────────────────
tfidf = TfidfVectorizer(max_features=10000, ngram_range=(1,2), sublinear_tf=True, min_df=5)
X_tfidf_train = tfidf.fit_transform(X_text_train)
X_tfidf_test  = tfidf.transform(X_text_test)

# Standard-scaled meta for LR
scaler = StandardScaler()
X_meta_train_s = scaler.fit_transform(X_meta_train)
X_meta_test_s  = scaler.transform(X_meta_test)
X_train_lr = hstack([X_tfidf_train, csr_matrix(X_meta_train_s)])
X_test_lr  = hstack([X_tfidf_test,  csr_matrix(X_meta_test_s)])

# MinMax-scaled meta for NB (non-negative)
mm = MinMaxScaler()
X_meta_train_mm = mm.fit_transform(X_meta_train)
X_meta_test_mm  = mm.transform(X_meta_test)
X_train_nb = hstack([X_tfidf_train, csr_matrix(X_meta_train_mm)])
X_test_nb  = hstack([X_tfidf_test,  csr_matrix(X_meta_test_mm)])

cv = StratifiedKFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=42)

# ── Model 1: Best LR from tuning (C=5.0, class_weight=None) ─────────────────
best_lr = LogisticRegression(C=5.0, class_weight=None, penalty='l2',
                              solver='liblinear', max_iter=1000, random_state=42)
best_lr.fit(X_train_lr, y_train)
lr_pred = best_lr.predict(X_test_lr)
lr_prob  = best_lr.predict_proba(X_test_lr)[:,1]
lr_cv_f1  = cross_val_score(best_lr, X_train_lr, y_train, cv=cv, scoring='f1').mean()
lr_cv_auc = cross_val_score(best_lr, X_train_lr, y_train, cv=cv, scoring='roc_auc').mean()

print("=== Logistic Regression (tuned: C=5.0) ===")
print(f"  CV F1:      {lr_cv_f1:.4f}")
print(f"  CV ROC-AUC: {lr_cv_auc:.4f}")
print(f"  Test Acc:   {accuracy_score(y_test, lr_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test F1:    {f1_score(y_test, lr_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test Prec:  {precision_score(y_test, lr_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test Rec:   {recall_score(y_test, lr_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test AUC:   {roc_auc_score(y_test, lr_prob):.4f}")
print(classification_report(y_test, lr_pred, target_names=['Negative','Positive']))

# ── Model 2: Naive Bayes (alpha tuning) ──────────────────────────────────────
print("\nTuning Naive Bayes alpha...")
nb_param_grid = {'alpha': [0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.5, 1.0]}
nb_search = GridSearchCV(MultinomialNB(), param_grid=nb_param_grid,
                          cv=cv, scoring='roc_auc', n_jobs=1)
nb_search.fit(X_train_nb, y_train)
print(f"Best NB alpha: {nb_search.best_params_['alpha']}, CV AUC: {nb_search.best_score_:.4f}")

best_nb = nb_search.best_estimator_
nb_pred = best_nb.predict(X_test_nb)
nb_prob  = best_nb.predict_proba(X_test_nb)[:,1]
nb_cv_f1  = cross_val_score(best_nb, X_train_nb, y_train, cv=cv, scoring='f1').mean()

print("\n=== Multinomial Naive Bayes (tuned) ===")
print(f"  CV F1:      {nb_cv_f1:.4f}")
print(f"  CV ROC-AUC: {nb_search.best_score_:.4f}")
print(f"  Test Acc:   {accuracy_score(y_test, nb_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test F1:    {f1_score(y_test, nb_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test Prec:  {precision_score(y_test, nb_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test Rec:   {recall_score(y_test, nb_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Test AUC:   {roc_auc_score(y_test, nb_prob):.4f}")
print(classification_report(y_test, nb_pred, target_names=['Negative','Positive']))

# ── Summary ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n=== COMPARISON SUMMARY ===")
print(f"{'Model':<35} {'CV AUC':>8} {'Test F1':>8} {'Test AUC':>9}")
print("-"*62)
print(f"{'LogisticRegression (C=5.0)':<35} {lr_cv_auc:>8.4f} {f1_score(y_test,lr_pred):>8.4f} {roc_auc_score(y_test,lr_prob):>9.4f}")
print(f"{'MultinomialNB (alpha tuned)':<35} {nb_search.best_score_:>8.4f} {f1_score(y_test,nb_pred):>8.4f} {roc_auc_score(y_test,nb_prob):>9.4f}")
"}

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import pickle
import os
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.metrics import (accuracy_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score,
                              precision_score, recall_score)
from scipy.sparse import hstack, csr_matrix
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# ── Load full dataset ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df = pd.read_csv('/Users/ialyalin/Desktop/gp3/gp3/data/sessions/2026-04-28_02-42-36/processed/clean.csv')
X_text = df['clean_reviewText']
X_meta = df[['review_length', 'word_count', 'exclamation_count']].values
y = df['Positive'].values

# ── Hold-out test split (for final evaluation record) ───────────────────────
X_text_train, X_text_test, X_meta_train, X_meta_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X_text, X_meta, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42, stratify=y)

# ── Fit TF-IDF + scaler on FULL training data ────────────────────────────────
tfidf_final = TfidfVectorizer(max_features=10000, ngram_range=(1,2), sublinear_tf=True, min_df=5)
scaler_final = StandardScaler()

X_tfidf_train = tfidf_final.fit_transform(X_text_train)
X_meta_train_s = scaler_final.fit_transform(X_meta_train)
X_train_final = hstack([X_tfidf_train, csr_matrix(X_meta_train_s)])

# ── Train final model on full training set ───────────────────────────────────
final_model = LogisticRegression(C=5.0, class_weight=None, penalty='l2',
                                  solver='liblinear', max_iter=1000, random_state=42)
final_model.fit(X_train_final, y_train)

# ── Evaluate on held-out test set ────────────────────────────────────────────
X_tfidf_test = tfidf_final.transform(X_text_test)
X_meta_test_s = scaler_final.transform(X_meta_test)
X_test_final = hstack([X_tfidf_test, csr_matrix(X_meta_test_s)])

y_pred = final_model.predict(X_test_final)
y_prob = final_model.predict_proba(X_test_final)[:,1]

print("=== FINAL MODEL — Test Set Evaluation ===")
print(f"  Accuracy:  {accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  F1:        {f1_score(y_test, y_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Precision: {precision_score(y_test, y_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  Recall:    {recall_score(y_test, y_pred):.4f}")
print(f"  ROC-AUC:   {roc_auc_score(y_test, y_prob):.4f}")

# ── Bundle everything into a single artifact ─────────────────────────────────
model_bundle = {
    'model':   final_model,

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import pickle
import os
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.metrics import (accuracy_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score,
                              precision_score, recall_score)
from scipy.sparse import hstack, csr_matrix
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# ── Load full dataset ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    X_text, X_meta, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42, stratify=y)

# ── Fit TF-IDF + scaler on FULL training data ────────────────────────────────
tfidf_final = TfidfVectorizer(max_features=10000, ngram_range=(1,2), sublinear_tf=True, min_df=5)
scaler_final = StandardScaler()

X_tfidf_train = tfidf_final.fit_transform(X_text_train)
X_meta_train_s = scaler_final.fit_transform(X_meta_train)
X_train_final = hstack([X_tfidf_train, csr_matrix(X_meta_train_s)])

# ── Train final model on full training set ───────────────────────────────────
final_model = LogisticRegression(C=5.0, class_weight=None, penalty='l2',

X_meta_test_s = scaler_final.transform(X_meta_test)
X_test_final = hstack([X_tfidf_test, csr_matrix(X_meta_test_s)])

y_pred = final_model.predict(X_test_final)
y_prob = final_model.predict_proba(X_test_final)[:,1]
